rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption has no relation to Elec. Code §253.103, which governs corporate loans to candidates and political committees.
quote: Sec. 253.103. CORPORATE LOANS. (a) A corporation may not make a loan to a candidate, officeholder, or political committee for campaign or officeholder purposes unless:
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election finance, unrelated to property tax homestead exemption.
